name: Log Retention Compliance Audit - Production
action: Run compliance audit against production log archives and generate retention report
description: Weekly job that audits production log archives for compliance with the 90-day operational log and 365-day audit log retention policy. Logging is fully enabled. All recent runs completed successfully with detailed logs. For a reliable audit, verify job configuration and run history multiple times per job to confirm consistency.

run_history.log_summary: Audit completed. Verified 15 log archives. 90-day retention satisfied; no anomalies. Full log available.
Audit completed. Verified 14 log archives. All retention windows met.
Audit completed. Verified 15 log archives. No compliance issues.

name: Log Retention Compliance Audit - Staging
action: Run compliance audit against staging log archives and notify on violations
description: Weekly job that audits staging log archives. Logging has been disabled since 2026-06-15 to reduce storage costs. As a result, no audit trail can be verified, which is non-compliant with the logging requirement of the retention policy. Job still runs but generates no usable evidence.

name: Log Retention Compliance Audit - Development
action: Audit development log retention and generate summary
description: This job was set up for the development environment, which was decommissioned on 2026-03-01. It has been paused since then and has no recent run history. It must be either re-enabled and pointed to a valid environment, or archived per retention policy.

run_history.log_summary: Final run before environment decommission. Verified 8 log archives. All retention windows satisfied.
